data.title: contract-schema-check pre-commit hook times out: scans all 33 contracts instead of only staged files
data.description: The check-contract-schemas.sh hook uses pass_filenames: false in .pre-commit-config.yaml, so it scans all 33 contract files on every triggered run. With 33 files × 3 python3 calls each = ~100 python3 spawns, the scan takes 30+ seconds but the wrapper kills it after 5s (exit 124). Affects any commit that stages a file under plugins/dso/docs/contracts/. Fix: change pass_filenames to true so only the staged file(s) are checked.
